hero.description: AI-powered drones and intelligent monitoring systems designed to secure the world's most sensitive environments.

technology.title: Every decision happens at <teal>the edge</teal>

about.description: TaknaaCode L.L.C — S.P.C is an innovation-driven technology company developing next-generation autonomous surveillance systems. We combine aerial robotics, embedded AI, and operator-first software to give organizations real-time control over their most critical environments.

vision.title: Vision
